title: Fried Silky Italian Courgette Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix, fresh, and silky Italian dish featuring courgettes that are stir-fried with a savory sauce for a nutritious meal.

ingredients.name: Courgettes
ingredients.notes: Washed and sliced into thin rounds

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the courgette slices to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until they start to brown lightly on both sides.
Add the chopped garlic and red pepper flakes if using, stirring well. Continue to cook for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in finely chopped basil leaves, mix well, and remove from heat immediately.
Serve hot as a light lunch dish or side with any pasta.
